full_text:
Tian Chou (Zitai) 田疇 (子泰)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Tian Chou (田疇), styledZitai (子泰), was born in Wuzhong county in Youbeiping. Acted as guide against Wuhuan for Wei, refused reward as he felt he had failed Liu Yu. Tian Chou was affiliated with Liu Yu, Yuan Shao, and the Wei Kingdom. Tian Chou lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
